seoTitle: Point Boston vs Point Pass — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Point Boston and Point Pass. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Point Boston vs Point Pass: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Point Boston and Point Pass.
heading: Point Boston vs Point Pass — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Point Boston, South Australia and Point Pass, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Point Boston has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Point Pass (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Point Boston or Point Pass safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Point Boston has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Point Pass scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Point Boston scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Point Pass scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Point Boston or Point Pass?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Point Boston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
